title: Maxillaria mystkowskana
taxonomy: Maxillaria mystkowskana is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of South America. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is further classified under the subfamily Cymbidioideae. The genus Maxillaria is characterized by its sympodial growth habit and fragrant flowers. Maxillaria mystkowskana is often grown as an ornamental plant due to its unique and attractive blooms. Its classification makes it a member of the monocot family, which includes other flowering plants such as grasses and lilies.
